Listen & Respond SOON

Quick placement
Find your level
5 questions · 30 seconds

Choose your level

Be honest — the AI adjusts to your level. You can change this anytime in Settings.

Choose a Scenario

Pick the situation you want to practice.

🔗 Language Connections

Words and patterns your languages share — use what you know to learn faster.

🃏 Vocab Quiz

Test yourself on your saved words.

💬 Free Chat

Just talk. No scenario, no pressure — pick a language and go.

Need a topic? Pick one to start

🧠 Culture Quiz

Read each question and pick the best answer — explanations shown after each one.

Test your knowledge of the culture behind your language.

🗣️ Native Ear

How the same language sounds completely different depending on where you are.

Step 1 of 5
What's your native language?
Takes about 60 seconds
So we know how to explain things to you
0 / 200
🌍

Pick a language.
Start talking.

Choose your language and dialect, pick a scenario — coffee shop, taxi, market — and your AI tutor plays the other person. You respond. That's it. No lessons, no grammar tables.

10 dialects · Spanish · French · Italian · Portuguese · Creole
⚡

The AI doesn't
go easy on you

As you improve, your tutor naturally picks up speed, stops waiting for you, and starts using slang. It'll misunderstand you on purpose sometimes — because that's what real conversations do. You learn to handle it.

Adapts to your level automatically
🧠

It remembers what
you struggled with

Words you hesitated on, phrases that tripped you up, expressions you used well — all tracked. Your tutor quietly brings them back in future conversations. No flashcards. No review decks. Just the language, again, in context.

Gets smarter the more you use it
🎙️

Your first session
takes 3 minutes

Tell us what you're learning and why. We'll place you at the right level and start you with a real scenario — no homework, no vocab list. Just open your mouth and go.

Built for real fluency, not test scores

🔁 Vocab Review

Words due for review based on spaced repetition.

🧩 Sentence Builder

Put the words in the right order.

🎧 Listening Mode

Hear it. Type what you heard.

✏️ Fill the Blank

Complete real sentences in your target language.

💬 Talk About It

Drop any topic — news, music, shows, sports, anything. The AI responds as a local.

Ideas to get you started

🎬 Scene Mode

Pick a scripted real-life scene — emotionally charged, awkward, exciting, or tense.

📋 Session History

Your past conversations — tap any to review.

🎙️
Tap the orb to speak
Tap + if you're stuckHints, translations, simplify — without ending the session
Tap 💾 to save a wordYou'll review it later with spaced repetition
Tap ⋯ to end the sessionYou'll get a summary and XP when you're done
Voice mode is on 🎤Tap the mic to speak your reply — or keep typing
